title: Dye Recipe Cost Optimizer
description: Industrial-grade tool for optimizing dye recipe costs using lean manufacturing and Six Sigma principles. Calculates total cost per batch, identifies hidden loss drivers, and suggests cost-reduction actions.

inputs.label: Dye bath volume (liters)
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of dye liquor in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of dye liquor in the batch.

inputs.label: Dye concentration (g/L)
inputs.businessContext: Grams of dye powder per liter of bath.

businessContext_i18n.en: Grams of dye powder per liter of bath.

inputs.label: Auxiliary chemicals cost (USD/L)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of salts, acids, bases, etc., per liter of bath.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of salts, acids, bases, etc., per liter of bath.

inputs.label: Energy cost per batch (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Electricity, steam, or gas cost for heating and running the dyeing machine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Electricity, steam, or gas cost for heating and running the dyeing machine.

inputs.label: Batch cycle time (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Total time from loading to unloading.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total time from loading to unloading.

inputs.label: Waste / rework rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of batches that require re-dyeing or are scrapped.

inputs.label: Water cost (USD/m³)
inputs.businessContext: Cost of fresh water and wastewater treatment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost of fresh water and wastewater treatment.

inputs.label: Water usage (L/kg fabric)
inputs.businessContext: Typical water consumption per kg of fabric processed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical water consumption per kg of fabric processed.

inputs.label: Fabric weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Weight of fabric in the batch.

businessContext_i18n.en: Weight of fabric in the batch.

inputs.label: Dye class
inputs.businessContext: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Chemical class of dye, affects fixation efficiency and cost.

inputs.label: Enable Lean optimization (reduce waste)
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies lean principles to reduce waste and rework.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies lean principles to reduce waste and rework.

rules.message: Dye bath volume is too low for the fabric weight. Minimum recommended is 3 L per kg fabric.
High reactive dye concentration may cause poor fixation and increased waste.
Waste rate exceeds 10%. Investigate root causes using Six Sigma DMAIC.

thresholds.message: Total batch cost exceeds $5,000. Consider cost reduction actions.
Cost per kg fabric exceeds $15. Benchmark against industry standard (ISO 14000).

formulas.description: Cost of waste/rework (including all variable costs)
Primary result: total cost per batch including waste
formulas.expression: dye_cost + chemical_cost + energy_cost_per_batch + labor_cost + water_cost + waste_cost

primary.label: Total cost per batch
primary.description: Sum of all direct and indirect costs including waste.

waste_cost.label: Waste / rework cost
waste_cost.description: Additional cost due to waste and rework.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Dye fixation loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Unfixed dye washed out, typical 10-30% for reactive dyes. Hidden cost in water and waste.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Water heating inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Heat loss during bath preparation and drainage. Typical 15% of energy cost.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Setup / changeover time
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Non-productive time between batches. Lean SMED can reduce this.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce waste using Six Sigma DMAIC
suggestedActions.description: Implement root cause analysis to lower waste percentage below 5%.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize dye concentration
suggestedActions.description: Use lower concentration with better fixation (e.g., 3 g/L instead of 5 g/L) to reduce dye cost and waste.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce water usage via lean methods
suggestedActions.description: Implement counter-current washing or reuse rinse water. Target 30% reduction.

suggestedActions.label: Improve energy efficiency
suggestedActions.description: Insulate dyeing machines, optimize heating profiles. Target 10% reduction.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Adjusted total cost (with confidence factor)
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Total cost multiplied by a confidence factor (0.9 to 1.1) based on input variability.
